backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Lit~Heaven backend, defining Book, Article, Review, and UserProfile types with CRUD operations, access control, and blob storage mixins for an ICP-based bookstore.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report tracking three logo-replacement features: updating the Navigation component, favicon in index.html, and BooksPage hero banner to use the new Brown Retro Book Store logo asset.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short descriptions summarizing each file's role in the Lit~Heaven React application.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind layers and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Lit~Heaven app, setting the page title, favicon to the new logo PNG, and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with a root route wrapping Layout and ProfileSetupModal, and an index route rendering BooksPage.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component showing copyright for Lit~Heaven and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout wrapper that composes Navigation, a main content area, and Footer into a full-height flex column for consistent page structure.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky responsive navigation header displaying the new Lit~Heaven logo, a Books link, theme toggle, and Internet Identity login/logout for both desktop and mobile (Sheet) viewports.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name, email, and bio, then saves the profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Button component that toggles between light and dark themes, persisting the choice in localStorage and applying the 'dark' class to the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider component, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles and books against the ICP backend actor, including useGetCallerUserProfile, useSaveCallerUserProfile, useGetAllBooks, and useAddBook.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm literary color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/BooksPage.tsx: Books listing page featuring a hero banner, search input, genre/price filters, sort controls, and a client-side filtered/sorted grid of book cards with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback for sensitive values like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch), fonts, border radii, shadows, and enabling dark mode, typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall state of the LitHaven project including version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of existing implemented features with their requirement IDs and versions.
